subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-10
subcodes.first_line: There is an attractive power in everything in the world, which is called the possibility of receiving the power of progress.... By being severed from the world I do not mean holding in contempt the things of the world
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @development of capacity and readiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
